title: MikroTik mANTBox ax 15s
description: Upgrade to WiFi 6 of the very popular mANTBOX base station with dual-band sector antenna. It is an all-in-one solution for all users who are trying to cover outdoor area such as parks, campsites. The 1 Gb/s LAN port can be used for internet connection or STFP with support up to 2.5 Gb/s for optical networks. For the station is not even a problem wireless connection of the type poin-to-multipoint and up to a distance of 20 km. Compared to the older model, speeds are up to 40% faster in the 5 GHz… WiFi 6 Option to connect to the network via LAN/STFP All-in-one device Connection via point-to-multipoint type for distances up to 20 km Device Gigabit PoE Injector Power Connector Cable Clamp Mounting Kit Mikrotik quickMount
